_doc: Deploy-ready fleet challenger arms validated by the mass-grind funnel, STAGED awaiting a live paper-account slot. Each entry is a complete fleet-v1 arm config (params_patch + gate_override) minus account_number/key_ref. To go live: assign a free paper account (account_number + secrets.json key_ref), set live:true, splice into accounts.json `arms`, run test_fleet_executor.py. All 6 current accounts are mid-experiment (flipped 2026-06-25 for data) -> a new key is the only thing between staged and live. NOT a permission gate -- a resource (Alpaca paper key J creates).

staged.key_ref: PENDING -- needs a free Alpaca paper account key in secrets.json
staged.config_source: inherit safe + gate_override + params_patch (mass-grind funnel winner)
staged.strike_note: Funnel winner is OTM-1; the fleet strike tables are SAFE=ATM / BOLD=OTM-2, so this arm deploys at OTM-2 (bold table, the #4 family member, $141/tr) -- faithful to the family. Exact OTM-1 needs an OTM-1 tier in strike_selection (small follow-up) if the 1-strike difference matters.
staged.validation_status: NOT-OVERFIT (WF 1.80 > 1, positive every quarter incl. held-out 2026). Owes: multiple-testing haircut acknowledged (3,360-config search; mitigated by 25-setup family coherence), and forward-paper evidence on this account before any live-money or params.json flip.
